author: ShadyTidus
description: Track reactions on announcement posts with persistent storage, signup history, statistics, export functionality, and deadline reminders. Creates an ordered list of who reacted first (first-come-first-served tracking).
install_msg:
SignupTracker cog installed. Use [p]signuptracker to configure.

Features:
- Persistent signup tracking (survives restarts)
- Signup history with statistics
- Export to JSON/CSV
- Deadline reminders
- First-come-first-served order tracking
short: Track reactions on announcements with history
name: SignupTracker
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores channel IDs, user IDs of signups, signup timestamps, and signup history.
